summary: Full scene transition graph traced. 2 CRITICAL, 2 HIGH, 3 MEDIUM findings. 1 existing test task executed (FACTION-GAME-FLOW-TEST).

findings.detail: GAME_SCENE = 'res://scenes/MerlinGame.tscn'. When _merlin_found=true, _on_hub() routes to old MerlinGame.tscn. Encounters now handled inline via EncounterCardOverlay — this path is dead and breaks navigation.
IntroTutorial.gd exists (const SCENE_HUB = 'res://scenes/HubAntre.tscn') but scenes/IntroTutorial.tscn does NOT exist. Any attempt to instantiate this scene will crash.

findings.check: Orphan scenes not yet deleted per director q-20260414-005
findings.detail: Director confirmed deletion (B: Supprimer IntroPersonalityQuiz + SceneRencontreMerlin). Both files still present after 2 cycles. E2E-DELETE-ORPHAN-SCENES priority 3 task still pending.

findings.check: ui_overlay_narrative routes to MenuPrincipal instead of Menu3DPC
findings.detail: change_scene_to_file('res://scenes/MenuPrincipal.tscn') — but active main menu is Menu3DPC.tscn. Player quitting during narrative overlay lands on wrong menu.
PixelTransitionConfig has profile entry for 'res://scenes/MerlinGame.tscn' — stale orphan config. Should be removed when E2E-MERLINGAME-OBSOLETE-PATH is implemented.
Debug SceneSelector still lists MerlinGame.tscn as a navigable scene. Low risk (debug only) but creates confusion.

findings.check: GameFlowController UNWIRED — EndRunScreen has no live return path
findings.detail: GameFlowController manages the full loop (Hub→Run→End→Hub) using HubScreen.tscn + Run3D.tscn + EndRunScreen.tscn. But it is NOT wired into any live scene (ARCH-GAMEFLOW-UNWIRED task open). EndRunScreen currently has no scene transition back to Hub. Player softlock risk.
PixelTransition.transition_to('res://scenes/Menu3DPC.tscn') — scene exists, transition system used. PASS.
SCENE_FOREST = 'res://scenes/BroceliandeForest3D.tscn'. Uses PixelTransition with direct fallback. Scene exists. PASS.
